executives.name: Christopher Womack
executives.background: Mr. Womack is chairman, president and CEO of Southern Company. He previously served as president of Southern Company and chairman, president and CEO of Georgia Power. He has held numerous leadership roles across Southern Company since joining in 1988.

tenure_dates.title: Chairman, President and Chief Executive Officer

executives.name: Daniel Tucker
executives.background: Mr. Tucker is executive vice president and chief financial officer of Southern Company. He previously served as executive vice president and chief financial officer of Georgia Power and has held various roles in finance and treasury since joining in 2003.

tenure_dates.title: Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer

executives.name: James Kerr II
executives.background: Mr. Kerr is chairman, president and CEO of Southern Company Gas and executive vice president of Southern Company. He previously served as chief legal officer and chief compliance officer.

tenure_dates.title: Chairman, President and CEO of Southern Company Gas

executives.name: Kimberly Greene
executives.background: Ms. Greene is chairman, president and CEO of Georgia Power. She previously served as chairman, president and CEO of Southern Company Gas and as Southern Company's chief operating officer.

tenure_dates.title: Chairman, President and CEO of Georgia Power

executives.name: Anthony Wilson
executives.background: Mr. Wilson is chairman, president and CEO of Mississippi Power. He has been with the Southern Company system since 1984.

tenure_dates.title: Chairman, President and CEO of Mississippi Power

board_of_directors.name: Christopher Womack
board_of_directors.background: Chairman, President and CEO of Southern Company.

board_of_directors.name: Janaki Akella
board_of_directors.background: Former Business Leader, Digital Transformation at Google LLC. Former Principal at McKinsey & Company.

board_of_directors.name: David Grain
board_of_directors.background: Founder and CEO of Grain Management, LLC. Former Lead Independent Director of Southern Company.

board_of_directors.name: Colette Honorable
board_of_directors.background: Partner at Reed Smith LLP. Former Commissioner of the Federal Energy Regulatory Commission (FERC).

board_of_directors.name: Donald James
board_of_directors.background: Retired Chairman and CEO of Vulcan Materials Company.

board_of_directors.name: John Johns
board_of_directors.background: Retired Chairman and CEO of Protective Life Corporation.

board_of_directors.name: Dale Klein
board_of_directors.background: Professor Emeritus and former Associate Vice Chancellor at the University of Texas System. Former Chairman of the U.S. Nuclear Regulatory Commission.

board_of_directors.name: Ernest Moniz
board_of_directors.background: CEO of the Energy Futures Initiative and the Nuclear Threat Initiative. Former U.S. Secretary of Energy.

board_of_directors.name: William Smith, Jr.
board_of_directors.background: Chairman, President and CEO of Capital City Bank Group, Inc.

board_of_directors.name: Lizanne Thomas
board_of_directors.background: Former Partner-in-Charge of the Southern U.S. Region of the law firm Jones Day.

board_of_directors.name: David Abney
board_of_directors.background: Retired Executive Chairman and CEO of United Parcel Service, Inc. (UPS).
